message:
test(core): add distributed persistence and native event resilience tests

main.rs:
- Add 2 new distributed persistence integration tests verifying
  sender-scoped pane ID mapping survives round-trip serialization
  and cross-node reconciliation (+155 lines)

native_events.rs:
- Add reconnect-after-disconnect test: verifies the event listener
  re-establishes its subscription after a transient connection drop,
  ensuring no events are silently lost during network hiccups
- Add oversized-line handling test: confirms lines exceeding the
  internal buffer limit are safely truncated rather than causing
  panics or corrupted event parsing (+106 lines)

These tests cover failure modes observed in production swarm
deployments where mux connections are long-lived and unreliable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
